title: Accusé de réception chypriote de l'instrument français

pages.text:
REPUBLIC

OF CYPRUS

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

ARN

4.12.69 85

No. 1485/69

The Hinistry of Foreign Affalrs presents Its

compliments to the Embassy of france and has the honour to acknowledge recelpt of the bassy's Mote lo. 100 of Morember 29, 1969, enclosing a letter from Hob. the Minister of Foreles

Affairs of the french Republlo addressed to the Mintster of

Foreign Affairs of the Republie of Cyprus by which the latter is notifled Is accordance with Article XVI, para. 2, of the

Agreement on Cultural, Sclentifie and Technical Co-operation between the tro Governents that the procedure required by the

Constitution of the French Republic for bringing into force the said Agreement has been completed.

2. In this connection, the Ministry wishes to intors the Embassy that the procedure required by the Constitution of Cyprus 1s expected to be completed by the end of January 1970.

The Winlatry of Forelen Affairs aralls Itself

of this opportunity to renew to the Babassy of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

11 costa, December Z

1969

The Embassy of Frances

Nicostea
